case_title: SAMUEL PUN VS. XIAO YUAN CAI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2018 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PUN, SAMUEL AS TO DEFENDANT CAI, XIAO YUAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,100.00 FILED BY PUN, SAMUEL AS TO DEFENDANT CAI, XIAO YUAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-20-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CAI, XIAO YUAN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY 25, 2018. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD, THE COURT TAKEN THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-25-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS DETAINED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PUN, SAMUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAI, XIAO YUAN $4,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,165.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
